title: cyclophorus annamensis
intro: Cyclophorus annamensis is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family, and is native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its sap, which contains a compound called cyclophorine, a potential anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Cyclophorus annamensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to create herbal remedies, which are used to treat various health conditions.
